g_zone_requires_future_system_work: G Zone deck slot model
Stride deck-building validation
G unit visibility and public-event policy
Stride timing and Generation Break runtime support

decision_options.label: Accept main-deck repair for G Zone decision
decision_options.effect: Allows M49-02 to decide whether the accepted recipe stays main-deck-only or waits for G Zone support; does not promote runtime.

decision_options.label: Request different main-deck repair
decision_options.effect: Keeps the recipe advisory and asks for another repair candidate.

decision_options.label: Reject recipe runtime candidate
decision_options.effect: Keeps this recipe out of future fixture promotion gates.

g_zone_decision_options.label: Use as main-deck-only fixture for current Windows scope
g_zone_decision_options.effect: Allows later validation to ignore G Zone recipe slots while keeping Stride/G-unit runtime disabled.

g_zone_decision_options.label: Defer this recipe until G Zone support exists
g_zone_decision_options.effect: Keeps the recipe advisory and blocks runtime fixture promotion.

g_zone_decision_options.label: Open a separate G Zone implementation queue
g_zone_decision_options.effect: Requires new specs/tests for G Zone slots, Stride timing, visibility, and validation before runtime use.
